mapper.select: SELECT PROD_ID, PROD_NAME, PROD_COST, PROD_PRICE, PROD_SALE , LPROD_NAME , BUYER_ID , BUYER_NAME , BUYER_ADD1 FROM PRODVIEW

SELECT PROD_ID, PROD_NAME, LPROD_GU, BUYER_ID, PROD_COST, PROD_PRICE, PROD_SALE, PROD_OUTLINE, PROD_DETAIL, PROD_IMG, PROD_TOTALSTOCK, PROD_INSDATE, PROD_PROPERSTOCK, PROD_SIZE, PROD_COLOR, PROD_DELIVERY, PROD_UNIT, PROD_QTYIN, PROD_QTYSALE, PROD_MILEAGE , LPROD_NAME , BUYER_NAME, BUYER_BANK, BUYER_BANKNO, BUYER_BANKNAME, BUYER_ZIP, BUYER_ADD1, BUYER_ADD2, BUYER_COMTEL, BUYER_FAX, BUYER_MAIL, BUYER_CHARGER, BUYER_TELEXT FROM PRODVIEW WHERE PROD_ID = #{prodId}
